data.title: Light code reviewer writes dimensions key but record-review.sh expects scores key in reviewer-findings.json
data.description: The dso:code-reviewer-light agent writes reviewer-findings.json with a 'dimensions' key, but record-review.sh validates against a schema expecting a 'scores' key. This forces the orchestrator to manually rewrite the file with the correct schema, which violates rule 12 (never manually call record-review.sh / fabricate review data). Either the light reviewer should output the correct schema or record-review.sh should accept both key names.
